about.title: THE RUNNER RUNNER STORY
about.text: In a world where speed is everything, only the strategic survive. Join the ultimate competitive race across the neon city streets.

features3d.heading:
ENDLESS RUN!
ENDLESS FUN!
features3d.description: IN RUNNER RUNNER, THE CITY IS YOUR PLAYGROUND. RUN, DODGE, AND COLLECT POWER-UPS TO BEAT YOUR HIGH SCORE. SIMPLE TO PLAY, HARD TO PUT DOWN. ARE YOU FAST ENOUGH TO STAY AHEAD?

community.title: RUN THROUGH THE CITY
community.desc: DASH THROUGH FAST-CHANGING STREETS FILLED WITH OBSTACALS TWISTS AND SURPRISES EVERY RUN IS DIFFERENT AND EVERY SECOND COUNTS.

community.title:
DODGE EVERYTHING IN
YOUR WAY
community.desc: JUMP SLIDE AND REACT FAST TO SURVIVE ONE WRONG MOVE AND THE RUN IS OVER.

community.title: POWER UP YOUR RUN
community.desc: GRAB BOOSTS SHIELDS AND BONUSES MID-RUNUSE THEM WISELY TO GO FURTHER AND SCORE HIGHER.

community.title: BEAT YOUR BEST
community.desc: CHALLENGE YOURSELF TO RUN FARTHER EVERY TIME CLIMB THE LEADERBOARD AND PROVE YOU'RE THE FASTEST.

characterSection.heading: HEY RUNNER!
characterSection.text:
THE CITY'S ALWAYS BEEN MY TURF, BUT NOW IT'S YOURS TO CONQUER.
THE STREETS ARE FULL OF OBSTACLES, POWER-UPS,
AND ENDLESS CHALLENGES. ARE YOU FAST ENOUGH TO BEAT THEM ALL?

runners.subtitle: FROM STREET ARTISTS TO FUTURISTIC RACERS, UNLOCK A UNIQUE ROSTER OF RUNNERS READY TO TAKE OVER THE CITY.

testimonials.text: "RUNNER RUNNER IS ABSOLUTELY ADDICTIVE! THE GAMEPLAY IS SMOOTH, THE CHARACTERS ARE AMAZING, AND EVERY RUN FEELS FRESH. I CAN'T STOP PLAYING!"
testimonials.name: SARAH MITCHELL

testimonials.text: "BEST ENDLESS RUNNER I'VE PLAYED. THE POWER-UPS ARE CREATIVE, THE WORLDS ARE BEAUTIFUL, AND THE DIFFICULTY CURVE IS PERFECT. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!"
testimonials.name: MARCUS JOHNSON

testimonials.text: "MY VIEWERS LOVE WATCHING ME PLAY RUNNER RUNNER. THE FAST-PACED ACTION AND COMPETITIVE MODES MAKE FOR GREAT CONTENT. THIS GAME IS A GEM!"
testimonials.name: EMMA CHEN

testimonials.text: "THE MECHANICS ARE TIGHT AND RESPONSIVE. I'VE BEEN GRINDING FOR HIGH SCORES AND THE LEADERBOARD SYSTEM KEEPS ME MOTIVATED. LOVE IT!"
testimonials.name: ALEX RODRIGUEZ

testimonials.text: "FINALLY, A MOBILE GAME THAT RESPECTS MY TIME! NO PAY-TO-WIN NONSENSE, JUST PURE FUN. RUNNER RUNNER IS MY GO-TO GAME DURING BREAKS."
testimonials.name: JESSICA LEE

testimonials.text: "THE CHARACTER DESIGNS ARE INCREDIBLE, AND THE NEON AESTHETIC IS SO COOL. THIS GAME HAS SERIOUS PRODUCTION VALUE. DEVELOPERS DID AN AMAZING JOB!"
testimonials.name: DAVID THOMPSON

faqSection.title: NEED HELP RIGHT NOW?
faqSection.subtitle: CHECK OUT THE FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

GAMEPLAY.a: YOU CAN DOWNLOAD RUNNER RUNNER DIRECTLY FROM OUR WEBSITE OR FROM YOUR PLATFORM'S APP STORE. IT'S COMPLETELY FREE TO PLAY.
YES, PC, MOBILE, AND CONSOLE PLATFORMS ARE ALL FULLY SUPPORTED AND ENABLE CROSS-PLAY.
YES, OPTIONAL COSMETIC ITEMS ARE AVAILABLE FOR PURCHASE IN-GAME.
YOU CAN COMPETE WITH OTHERS IN REAL-TIME MATCHES AND TOURNAMENTS.
NO, RUNNER RUNNER REQUIRES AN INTERNET CONNECTION TO SYNC SCORES AND MATCH WITH PLAYERS.

EVENTS.a: NEW EVENTS TYPICALLY START EVERY FIRST FRIDAY OF THE MONTH.
SOME EXCLUSIVE ITEMS MAY RETURN DURING ANNIVERSARY CELEBRATIONS.

EVENTS.q: HOW DO I PARTICIPATE IN TOURNAMENTS?
EVENTS.a: YOU CAN SIGN UP FOR TOURNAMENTS THROUGH THE EVENTS TAB.
TOP 10% OF PLAYERS EACH SEASON EARN EXCLUSIVE TITLES AND BANNERS.
NO, EVENTS REQUiRE AN ACTIVE INTERNET CONNECTION.

GAME MODES.a: SURVIVAL MODE CHALLENGES YOU TO LAST AS LONG AS POSSIBLE AGAINST ENDLESS WAVES.

GAME MODES.q: CAN I PLAY WITH FRIENDS IN CO-OP?
GAME MODES.a: YES, CO-OP MODE SUPPORTS UP TO 4 PLAYERS IN A SINGLE SESSION.
COMPETITIVE RANKED PLAY IS AVAILABLE FOR PLAYERS LEVEL 10 AND ABOVE.
YES, YOU CAN TEST YOUR ABILITIES IN THE TRAINING RANGE OFFLINE.

GAME MODES.q: HOW DO I UNLOCK NEW MODES?
GAME MODES.a: NEW GAME MODES ARE EXPERIENCED AS YOU PROGRESS AND LEVEL UP.

REWARDS.a: COINS ARE EARNED BY COMPLETING MATCHES, DAILY CHALLENGES, AND LEVELING UP.
THE BATTLE PASS OFFERS A TIERED REWARD SYSTEM WITH EXCLUSIVE COSMETICS.

REWARDS.q: HOW DO I CLAIM DAILY REWARDS?
REWARDS.a: LOG IN EVERY DAY AND CLAIM YOUR REWARD FROM THE MAIN DASHBOARD.

REWARDS.q: CAN I GIFT REWARDS TO FRIENDS?
REWARDS.a: NO, ITEM GIFTING IS CURRENTLY NOT SUPPORTED IN THE GAME.
UNCLAIMED EVENT REWARDS MAY EXPIRE SEVERAL DAYS AFTER THE EVENT ENDS.

bonusRoad.title: BONUS ROAD
bonusRoad.subtitle: ENTER THE BONUS ROAD.
bonusRoad.description: FIND THE BONUS ROAD AND SHIFT INTO A HIGH-REWARD ROUTE FILLED WITH EXTRA COINS AND BIG SCORING OPPORTUNITIES.

questions.question: HOW DO I DOWNLOAD RUNNER RUNNER?
questions.answer: YOU CAN DOWNLOAD RUNNER RUNNER DIRECTLY FROM OUR WEBSITE OR FROM YOUR PLATFORM'S APP STORE. IT'S COMPLETELY FREE TO PLAY, WITH OPTIONAL COSMETIC UPGRADES AVAILABLE IN-GAME.

questions.question: WHAT PLATFORMS ARE SUPPORTED?
questions.answer: RUNNER RUNNER IS CURRENTLY AVAILABLE ON ANDROID AND IOS DEVICES. WE ARE ALSO WORKING ON A PC VERSION TO BE RELEASED SOON.

questions.question: ARE THERE IN-APP PURCHASES?
questions.answer: YES, RUNNER RUNNER OFFERS OPTIONAL IN-APP PURCHASES FOR COSMETIC ITEMS LIKE CHARACTER SKINS, POWER-UPS, AND BATTLE PASSES. THESE DO NOT PROVIDE COMPETITIVE ADVANTAGES.

questions.question: HOW DOES MULTIPLAYER WORK?
questions.answer: MULTIPLAYER IN RUNNER RUNNER ALLOWS YOU TO COMPETE AGAINST FRIENDS OR RANDOM PLAYERS WORLDWIDE IN REAL-TIME RACES. WINNING RACES EARNS YOU RANKING POINTS AND EXCLUSIVE REWARDS.

questions.question: CAN I PLAY OFFLINE?
questions.answer: WHILE THE CORE MULTIPLAYER EXPERIENCE REQUIRES AN INTERNET CONNECTION, WE OFFER AN OFFLINE PRACTICE MODE WHERE YOU CAN HONE YOUR SKILLS ON VARIOUS TRACKS WITHOUT COMPETING AGAINST OTHERS.

cta.title: Where Will You run next?
cta.subtitle1: Each map offers a unique environment and new challenges.
cta.subtitle2: Choose your map and start the adventure!
